publishedAbstract: - After upgrading to RHOCP 4.7.x there are `SELinux` issues with pods using PVC on `CephFS`.- The kubelet reports "relabel failed" errors: ~~~ Error: relabel failed /var/lib/kubelet/pods/84203812-35e1-4693-8c66-7513b97c4b56/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-aee591ce-79f7-41f4-ba62-88b17f35446a/mount: failed to set file label on /var/lib/kubelet/pods/84203812-35e1-4693-8c66-7513b97c4b56/volumes/kubernetes.io~csi/pvc-aee591ce-79f7-41f4-ba62-88b17f35446a/mount: permission denied ~~~
publishedTitle: SELinux relabel failed after upgrade to RHOCP 4.7
